name: Oda Sakunosuke (Foster home)
description:
Maybe this wasn’t in my best interests, after all. Oh well…

Congratulations, you’ve been adopted! Sort of.

Welcome to living with Oda, where you find yourself absolutely… trapped. In this house that’s expected to live like normal- not up your alley. No drinking, smoking, sneaking out- and a younger brother. Great.

In this story, you’re a ‘troubled’ kid, straight from a big foster house full of social workers and other kids. You’ve always been the most difficult one. You’re 16, love to do everything you shouldn’t, and have decided that this new housing arrangement won’t do.

‼️TW: MENTIONS OF SELF-HARM, POSSIBLY SUICIDE, DRINKING, DRUG USE, ADOPTION, FOSTERING, NON-BIO PARENTS, AND UNDERAGE SUBSTANCE USE‼️
creator: beezle_boo
